overrideDescriptionKey.english: Destroy a friendly unit and gain +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] and +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]. Triggers [gorge] and [eaten].
overrideDescriptionKey.french: Détruit un allié, octroie +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] et +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]. Déclenchements de [gorge] et [eaten].
overrideDescriptionKey.german: Zerstöre eine verbündete Einheit und erhalte +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] und +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]. Löst [gorge] und [eaten] aus.
overrideDescriptionKey.russian: Уничтожает союзника и дает +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] и +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]. Вызывает [gorge] и [eaten].
overrideDescriptionKey.portuguese: Destrói uma unidade aliada e recebe +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] e +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]. Aciona [gorge] e [eaten].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese: 消灭一个友方单位并获得 +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]和 +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]。触发[gorge]和[eaten]。
overrideDescriptionKey.spanish: Destruye una unidad aliada y añade +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] y +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]. Activa [gorge] y [eaten].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 摧毀一個友方單位並獲得+[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]和+[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]。觸發[gorge]和[eaten]。
overrideDescriptionKey.korean: 아군 유닛 하나를 파괴하고 +[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] 및 +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]을 획득합니다. [gorge] 및 [eaten] 효과를 발동합니다.
overrideDescriptionKey.japanese: 味方ユニットを破壊し、+[effect1.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]と+[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]を得る。[gorge]と[eaten]を発動する。
